heroHeadline: BTS: From Bangtan Boys to Global K-Pop Phenomenon and UN Ambassadors
heroSubtitle: Tracking 4,663+ days of record-breaking music, world tours, military service, and ARMY fandom — now reunited for their first album since 2020.
footerNote: Data sourced from HYBE, Billboard, Gaon Chart, Melon, Guinness World Records, IFPI, and Recording Academy.
